task: yeah go ahead and start that investigation

yes, I also dont know how well gsd executor will handle a plan 0, so all subsequent plans will need to be renumbered. On the bright side, there should be a lot less testing necessary now that package code is being reused.

task: in terms of bringing the tee layer up to speed, would there be any benefit from going with a more fully featured framework approach like nestjs for the tee worker? this would keep it consistent with the api and some of the instrumentation and other layers could be reused.
